description_long: This is a black wireless game controller, featuring a matte plastic body with two ergonomic hand grips and a slightly curved top surface. The front face displays two analog thumbsticks, a directional pad, four colored action buttons labeled A, B, X, and Y, and a central Xbox logo button. Additional smaller buttons for menu and view functions are present, along with shoulder and trigger buttons on the top edge. The rear side is contoured for comfortable hand placement and includes a battery compartment. The overall design is sleek and modern, with subtle texturing on the grips for improved handling. This controller is commonly used for gaming consoles and can be found in living rooms, gaming cafes, or urban recreational spaces.
description: A sleek black wireless game controller with ergonomic grips, dual thumbsticks, and colored action buttons. The design is modern, with a matte finish and prominent Xbox branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main controls: thumbsticks, D-pad, colored A/B/X/Y buttons, and the Xbox logo button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the ergonomic grip and the raised profile of the thumbsticks and buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured back, battery compartment, and shoulder/trigger buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the smooth, curved grip and the button layout from a different perspective.
